zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice de Ireby於1372年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德希 易比時，她的父親Sir John De Ireby sheriff17歲，母親Katherine Leigh12歲。她於1401年3月2日與Sir John de Skelton在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年在英國享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾阿斯可利格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice de Ireby于1372年出生在英国英格兰波藍德希 易比时，她的父亲Sir John De Ireby sheriff17岁，母亲Katherine Leigh12岁。她于1401年3月2日与Sir John de Skelton在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年在英国享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾阿斯可利格。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ireby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Irby in Lincolnshire, Cheshire, and North Yorkshire, or Ireby (Cumberland and Lancashire), all named from Old Norse Írabýr ‘settlement of the Irish’. Compare Ireton .

variants.name: Ireton
meanings: English: most probably a habitational name from Kirk Ireton (Derbyshire) or perhaps from Ireton Farm in Weston Underwood (Derbyshire), both named in Anglo-Scandinavian as Íratūn ‘settlement of the Irish’ or more likely ‘settlement of the Irishman’. The reference may be either to a Scandinavian Viking who had been in Ireland or to an Irishman who came to England with the Vikings. Occasionally the name may also derive from either of two places called Irton in North Yorkshire, of which Irton in Seamer parish is a more likely source than the lost Irton in Coxwold. Both the North Yorkshire places have the same etymologies as those above.

variants.name: Erby
meanings: English: variant of   Irby  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice de Ireby was born in 1372, in High Ireby, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John De Ireby sheriff, was 17 and her mother, Katherine Leigh, was 12. She married Sir John de Skelton on 2 March 1401, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1439, in England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice de Ireby est née en 1372, à High Ireby, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John De Ireby sheriff, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Katherine Leigh, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Skelton le 2 mars 1401, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1439, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice de Ireby 1372 in High Ireby, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Ireby sheriff 17 und ihre Mutter Katherine Leigh 12. Sie hat am 2. März 1401 in Cumberland, England Sir John de Skelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1439 im Alter von 67 Jahren in England und wurde in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John de Skelton il 2 marzo 1401, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1439, nel England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Irebyが1372年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドヒグ アイレビーで生まれた時，父Sir John De Ireby sheriffは17歳，母Katherine Leighは12歳であった。1401年3月2日にイギリスクウンバーランドでSir John de Skeltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年にイギリスで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Ireby(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 히그h 이레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Ireby sheriff(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Leigh(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1401년 3월 2일 영국 c벌랜드에서 Sir John de Skelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 영국에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 아스크리그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Ireby nasceu em 1372, em High Ireby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John De Ireby sheriff, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Leigh, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Skelton em 2 de março de 1401, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1439, em Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice de Ireby родилась в 1372 г. в местности хаи иреби, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John De Ireby sheriff было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Leigh, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Skelton 2 марта 1401 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1439 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности аскриг, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
